titleStmt.title: SII 11.108: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 108. (B.K. No. 103 of 1926-27). CHIÑCHLI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB IN THE TEMPLE CALLED KARIDĒVARA-GUḌI

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and records the gift of a flower-garden made to the temple of Sorkkayara Nāgēśvaradēva by Maṇasaṁdara Dēvaṇṇa. The charity was left in the care of the Fifty-six Mahājanas of Chiṁchila, who had sold the land free of encumbrances.
The record is dated Śaka 991 (in words), Saumya, Śrāvaṇa, śu. pāḍiva, solar eclipse which corresponds to Tuesday, July 21, A.D. 1069.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpri
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvana
ykamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttaraṁ saluttamire . svasti sakavarṣa voṁ
bhaynūṟa toṁbhattoṁdeneya saumyasaṁva
tsarada śrāvaṇa suddha pāḍivaṁ sūryya
grahaṇadaṁdu samastaguṇasaṁpannara
ppa śrīmacciṁcilada mahājanama
yvattaṟuvara kayyoḷu maṇasaṁdara dē
vaṇnaṁ sarvvabādhā parihāramāgi paḍe
dūriṁ Īsānyada tamma pāḷakeyya taḷa
doḷage jīragepaḷḷada taḍiyoḷsorkkaya
ra nāgēśvaradēvargge biṭṭa pūdōṁṭa pattu
gēṇa kōloḷu mattarūṁdu Ā tōṁṭama
nārorvvarmmāḍuva mālagāṟa rddēvargge naḍe
yisuva kaṇagileya giḍuvirppattu
mattina puḻpajāti yēnūṁdādaḍa giḍu
jātiyoḷaydu davanaṁ marugina ma
ḍiyoṁdoṁdaṟalaydu Ī dharmmama
nayvattaṟuvaruṁ kādu naḍeyisuvar
Idanaḷidava rkkavileyuṁ brāhmaṇa
ru manaḷida pātekarappar .The
mattaṁ deseyoḷmahāja naṁ
gaḷ teṟadettuṇba guṇigana mattar 1
Digital edition of SII 11.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
